Put song files in this folder, then list the ones that should appear in the music section in `snippets.json`.

`track1_sunrise.wav` is currently used as the site's startup track, so it is not listed in the snippet panel.

Example:

```json
[
  {
    "title": "Midnight Sketch",
    "artist": "Sofia",
    "src": "/music-snippets/midnight-sketch.mp3",
    "note": "Piano snippet"
  }
]
```

Recommended web audio formats: `.mp3`, `.m4a`, `.ogg`, or `.wav`.
